MIGRATE-WARM.summary: Source side (AqRaft Stage 6 pre-establish): open/reuse the outbound RDMA link to the recipient and pre-register this donor's source staging buffers for its first-N owned slots, WITHOUT moving data or changing any slot state. Run during the pre-reshard pause so a later RDMA MIGRATE-ALL pays only the data-movement window. Idempotent.
MIGRATE-WARM.complexity: O(N) in slots-per-source (one big-MR registration + N per-slot views).
